workflow.name: Drone CI HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Drone CI HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Drone CI inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/drone_ci-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[drone_ci]
10.31.134.11 role=ci name=drone-ci-01
10.31.134.12 role=ci name=drone-ci-02
10.31.134.13 role=ci name=drone-ci-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Drone CI container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/drone_ci-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: drone_ci
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/drone_ci-inventory.ini /tmp/drone_ci-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Drone CI cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/drone_ci-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: drone_ci
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/drone_ci
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/drone_ci/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            drone:
              image: drone/drone:2
              container_name: octastack-drone
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                DRONE_GITEA_SERVER: "http://gitea.example.internal"
                DRONE_RPC_SECRET: "change-me"
                DRONE_SERVER_HOST: "drone.example.internal"
                DRONE_SERVER_PROTO: "http"
              ports:
                - "8080:80"
              volumes:
                - data:/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Drone CI cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/drone_ci-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/drone_ci/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/drone_ci/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/drone_ci/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/drone_ci-inventory.ini /tmp/drone_ci-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Drone CI topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/drone_ci-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Drone CI HA topology

Members:
- drone-ci-01: 10.31.134.11 (ci)
- drone-ci-02: 10.31.134.12 (ci)
- drone-ci-03: 10.31.134.13 (ci)

This example deploys one Drone CI container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/drone_ci-topology.md

data.label: Validate Drone CI cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/drone_ci-inventory.ini drone_ci -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
